mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sitePic(SPICNUM, SITENUM, fileName) VALUES(SITEPIC_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{sitenum}, #{fileName})
INSERT INTO sitedetailPic(SdPICNUM, DETAILNUM, fileName) VALUES(sitedetailPic_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{detailnum}, #{fileName})
mapper.select: SELECT SITENUM,SITENAME,SITELOCAL,addr1,addr2, CATEGORY,ENVIRONMENT,HITCOUNT, AVGSTAR FROM campingsite where MEMBERIDX=#{memberIdx} ORDER BY SITENUM DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH FIRST #{size} ROWS ONLY
SELECT DETAILNUM,SITENUM,DETAILNAME,PRICE,AREA,CONTENT,CAPACITY,floor FROM sitedetail where sitenum=#{siteNum} ORDER BY DETAILNUM DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH FIRST #{size} ROWS ONLY
SELECT SITENUM,SITENAME,INTrODUCE,SITELOCAL,ZIP,addr1,addr2, THUMBNAIL,CATEGORY,ENVIRONMENT,HITCOUNT,CHECKIN,checkout, MEMBERIDX,AVGSTAR,SITEOPTION,ENABLED FROM campingsite where SITENUM=#{siteNum}
